title: Blackmoor Orb 5 Piece Knife Set with Storage Stand/Stainless Steel Knives with Soft Grip Handles & Brushed Steel or Wood Detail/Easy Clean Essential Kitchen Accessory (Black & Wood Effect)
features: 5 PIECE KNIFE SET - This 5-piece stainless steel knife set includes all the essentials for your kitchen - a versatile 8-inch chef’s knife, 8-inch bread knife, 8-inch carving knife, 5-inch utility knife, and a 3.5-inch paring knife. Perfect for slicing, dicing, chopping, and carving meats, fish, vegetables, and bread with precision.

ROUND STORAGE BLOCK - When not in use, the knives sit neatly in the included freestanding knife block. Its sleek, matte cylinder design adds a modern and sophisticated touch to your countertop while keeping your knives organised and easily accessible.

SOFT TOUCH HANDLES - The handle of each knife is thoughtfully designed with a soft-grip material for a secure hold. This enhances precision, promotes stability during use and reduces hand fatigue, making it a perfect choice for both professional chefs and home cooks.

DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL - Crafted with high-quality stainless steel, these rust-resistant knives offer exceptional durability, sharpness, and precision, making meal prep effortless for many years to come. They are easy to clean by hand, making them a practical and stylish addition to your kitchen essentials.

BLACKMOOR - Blackmoor is the market-leading provider of the very best kitchen essentials to inspire the everyday home cook. Find everything from pots and pans, to knife sets, bakeware essentials and cooking utensils all at the Blackmoor Amazon store page today!
description: Product Description Stainless Steel Knife Sets Blackmoor's knife set range is crafted from high-quality, rust-resistant stainless steel, ensuring long-lasting sharpness and reliability for every culinary task. Each set is meticulously designed for balance and control, from razor-sharp chef's knives to versatile paring knives, offering an effortless cutting experience. Whether you're a seasoned chef or a home cook, these knife sets are an essential upgrade to your culinary arsenal, delivering precision and elegance in every slice. Previous page Food Prep Made Easy Slice, dice, & cut meats, bread, fish, and vegetables with our wide range of kitchen knives. High Quality Blades All Blackmoor knives are made from high-quality stainless steel to make light work of food prep. Practical and Stylish Choose from our selection of stylish yet practical storage blocks to store your knives. Comfortable Grip Handles are comfortable to hold and deliver precision and stability when in use. Long Lasting Each knife set is hardwearing for long-term daily use.
